languages.text: "Священники в капелле вашего флагмана говорят, что власть дарована дворянам Богом-Императором. А он ошибаться не может. Если вы подозреваете эти благородные семьи в ереси, то только скажите".

"The priests in the flagship's chapel say that the God-Emperor Himself grants power to the nobility. And He cannot be wrong. If you suspect these noble families of heresy, you need only give the word."
languages.original_text: "Священники в капелле вашего флагмана говорят, что власть дарована дворянам Богом-Императором. А он ошибаться не может. Если вы подозреваете эти благородные семьи в ереси, то только скажите".

traits.locale_text: "The priests in the flagship's chapel say that the God-Emperor Himself grants power to the nobility. And He cannot be wrong. If you suspect these noble families of heresy, you need only say the word."

"The priests in the flagship's chapel say that the God-Emperor Himself grants power to the nobility. And He cannot be wrong. If you suspect these noble families of heresy, you need only give the word."
"You sound just like Batoshski. But I'll trust in your grasp of politics."

"The priests in the flagship's chapel say that the God-Emperor Himself grants power to the nobility. And He cannot be wrong. If you suspect these noble families of heresy, you need only say the word."

"The priests in the flagship's chapel say that the God-Emperor Himself grants power to the nobility. And He cannot be wrong. If you suspect these noble families of heresy, you need only give the word."

languages.text: 「あなたはバトシュスキーそっくりですね。でも、政治の知識は信頼します」
languages.original_text: "You sound just like Batoshski. But I'll trust in your grasp of politics."

languages.text: "Sancak gemisinin şapelindeki rahipler, soylulara gücü bizzat Tanrı İmparator'un bahşettiğini söylüyor. O yanılamaz. Bu soylu ailelerin kâfirlik yaptığından şüpheleniyorsanız emir vermeniz yeterli."
languages.original_text: "The priests in the flagship's chapel say that the God-Emperor Himself grants power to the nobility. And He cannot be wrong. If you suspect these noble families of heresy, you need only give the word."

traits.locale_text: "Sancak gemisinin şapelindeki rahipler, soylulara gücü bizzat Tanrı İmparator'un bahşettiğini söylüyor. O yanılamaz. Bu soylu ailelerin kâfirlik yaptığından şüpheleniyorsanız emir vermeniz yeterli."

languages.text: “旗舰礼拜堂的牧师说，神皇亲自将力量赐予了贵族。而祂绝不会犯错。若您怀疑这些家族行异端之事，只需一声令下。”
languages.original_text: "The priests in the flagship's chapel say that the God-Emperor Himself grants power to the nobility. And He cannot be wrong. If you suspect these noble families of heresy, you need only give the word."

traits.locale_text: “旗舰礼拜堂的牧师说，神皇亲自将力量赐予了贵族。而祂绝不会犯错。若您怀疑这些家族行异端之事，只需一声令下。”

languages.text: "Die Priester in der Kapelle des Flaggschiffes sagen, der Gottimperator Selbst gewährt dem Adel Macht. Und Er irrt sich niemals. Falls Ihr diese adeligen Familien der Ketzerei verdächtigt, sagt einfach Bescheid."
languages.original_text: "The priests in the flagship's chapel say that the God-Emperor Himself grants power to the nobility. And He cannot be wrong. If you suspect these noble families of heresy, you need only give the word."

traits.locale_text: "Die Priester in der Kapelle des Flaggschiffes sagen, der Gottimperator Selbst gewährt dem Adel Macht. Und Er irrt sich niemals. Falls Ihr diese adeligen Familien der Ketzerei verdächtigt, sagt einfach Bescheid."

languages.text: « Selon les prêtres du vaisseau amiral, l'Empereur-Dieu lui-même octroie puissance et influence aux nobles. Et Il ne se trompe jamais. Si vous suspectez ces familles d'hérésie, nous sommes prêts à agir. »
languages.original_text: "The priests in the flagship's chapel say that the God-Emperor Himself grants power to the nobility. And He cannot be wrong. If you suspect these noble families of heresy, you need only give the word."

traits.locale_text: « Selon les prêtres du vaisseau amiral, l'Empereur-Dieu lui-même octroie puissance et influence aux nobles. Et Il ne se trompe jamais. Si vous suspectez ces familles d'hérésie, nous sommes prêts à agir. »

languages.text: «Los sacerdotes de la capilla de la nave insignia dicen que el propio Dios Emperador otorga poder a la nobleza, y Él no puede equivocarse. Si sospecha de herejía en alguna de esas familias, solo tiene que dar la orden».
languages.original_text: "The priests in the flagship's chapel say that the God-Emperor Himself grants power to the nobility. And He cannot be wrong. If you suspect these noble families of heresy, you need only give the word."

traits.locale_text: «Los sacerdotes de la capilla de la nave insignia dicen que el propio Dios Emperador otorga poder a la nobleza, y Él no puede equivocarse. Si sospecha de herejía en alguna de esas familias, solo tiene que dar la orden».
